description_long: This is a commercial-grade coffee machine with a robust, boxy structure and a metallic finish, designed for high-volume use. The front features three group heads, each with its own portafilter and control knob, allowing for simultaneous brewing of multiple espresso shots. A wide drip tray spans the base, providing ample space for cups and easy cleaning. The top section appears to have a flat surface, likely intended for cup storage or warming. The sides are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the machine's industrial durability. The back is plain, with no visible controls or branding.
description: A large, metallic commercial coffee machine with three group heads, portafilters, and a wide drip tray, designed for high-capacity espresso brewing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the machine's depth, solid side panel, and a protruding portafilter.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three group heads, control knobs, portafilters, and the full drip tray.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side with a visible portafilter and solid panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, featureless back panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Three evenly spaced round control knobs above each group head, with small indicator lights above each knob.
